entries.title: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
entries.description: Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.

entries.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
entries.description: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

entries.title: SpaceX falls to $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
entries.description: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

entries.title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
entries.description: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

entries.title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
entries.description: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

entries.title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
entries.description: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and dis

entries.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
entries.description: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

entries.title: Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
entries.description: Can a handful of engineers really do the work of an army of consultants? That’s the bet behind Ode with Anthropic — the joint venture dedicated to embedding forward-deployed engineers in enterprise fi

entries.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
entries.description: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from promp

entries.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
entries.description: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

entries.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
entries.description: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

entries.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
entries.description: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward softwar

entries.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
entries.description: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

entries.title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product

entries.title: Why AMI Labs’ Alexandre LeBrun won’t call his AI ‘AGI’ or ‘superintelligence’
entries.description: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.

entries.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
entries.description: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

entries.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
entries.description: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

entries.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
entries.description: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.
